about_bio: With over 18 years of experience in large-scale commercial system development, 8+ years in system architecture and R&D team management, and 5+ years in requirements management, product design, system architecture, development, testing, iteration, and operations. Focused on high-concurrency, distributed, high-availability, and microservice ecosystems. The self-developed MainTank framework has accumulated and advanced experience in financial systems, lottery betting systems, instant lottery systems, cross-border payment systems, cryptocurrency exchanges, and 1v1 live streaming platforms. Led the full-stack evolution of MainTank from monolithic to microservices, SaaS multi-tenant, B2B2C, and S2B2C platforms, covering PC and mobile management, merchant, and customer platforms. Currently, the system has accumulated 800,000 general product barcodes and 200,000 medical/pharmaceutical barcodes.
about_exp_period1: 2024 - Present | Beijing Cherry Technology Co., Ltd. · Partner / Technical Director / MainTank Architect
about_exp_desc1_1: Led the overall architecture design of MainTank, evolving from monolithic to microservice architecture based on Spring Cloud Alibaba, splitting into 10+ independent services, supporting tens of millions of daily API calls.
about_exp_desc1_2: Designed and implemented SaaS multi-tenant mall solution, including tenant isolation, package authorization, independent domains, unified Ops and monitoring.
about_exp_desc1_3: Built S2B2C supply chain collaboration platform, connecting suppliers, stores and users, enabling product agency, order collaboration, inventory synchronization and settlement reconciliation, successfully launched in multiple industrial zones.
about_exp_desc1_4: Led the team to complete Kubernetes containerization, CI/CD pipelines, canary releases and full-link tracing, ensuring 99.99% system availability.
about_edu_desc: China University of Geosciences (Beijing) · Software Engineering · Bachelor's Degree
about_edu_detail: Received a silver medal during university, graduation project rated as excellent, and awarded Bachelor's degree.
